zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald FitzReynald於大約1276年出生在英國薩默塞特修頓時，他的父親Reginald FitzPiers70歲，母親Joan de Vivonne27歲。他去世於1328年在英國享年53歲。

zh-hans.Hinton Martel, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特韓丁 馬特爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald FitzReynald于大约1276年出生在英国薩默塞特修頓时，他的父亲Reginald FitzPiers70岁，母亲Joan de Vivonne27岁。他去世于1328年在英国享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald FitzReynald was born about 1276, in Chewton, Somerset, England, his father, Reginald FitzPiers, was 70 and his mother, Joan de Vivonne, was 27. He died in 1328, in England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald FitzReynald est né environ 1276, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reginald FitzPiers, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Joan de Vivonne, avait 27 ans. Il est décédé en 1328, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald FitzReynald um 1276 in Chewton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald FitzPiers 70 und seine Mutter Joan de Vivonne 27. Er starb 1328 im Alter von 53 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald FitzReynald è nato il circa 1276 nel Chewton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Reginald FitzPiers, aveva 70 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Vivonne, aveva 27 anni. Morì nel 1328, nel England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald FitzReynaldが約1276年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンで生まれた時，父Reginald FitzPiersは70歳，母Joan de Vivonneは27歳であった。彼は1328年にイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald FitzReynald(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald FitzPiers(은)는 70세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Vivonne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1328년 영국에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald FitzReynald nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald FitzPiers, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Vivonne, tinha 27 anos. Ele faleceu em 1328, em Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald FitzReynald родился около 1276 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald FitzPiers было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Vivonne, 27. Он умер в 1328 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald FitzReynald nació aproximadamente 1276, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald FitzPiers, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Joan de Vivonne, tenía 27 años. Murió en 1328, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
